installSteps:
Install the plugin:
git clone https://github.com/TMHSDigital/Monday-Cursor-Plugin.git
Open the cloned folder in Cursor IDE.

Install the Monday MCP server from the Cursor Marketplace:
Open Cursor Settings → MCP → search monday → install Monday Developer Tools.
Get your Monday API token: Go to monday.com → Profile → Admin → API. Copy your personal token.
Configure auth: The Monday MCP plugin will prompt for your API token on first use, or you can set it in the plugin settings.
Restart Cursor. The 21 skills, 8 rules, and 45 MCP tools are now active. You can query boards, create items, manage sprints, and more.

relatedTools.name: Steam Cursor Plugin
relatedTools.description: Steam and Steamworks integration for Cursor
